---
title: "SMC++"
output:
  github_document:
    toc: TRUE
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
source(here("analysis", "smcpp", "smcpp.R"))

# Set global options
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  cache = TRUE,
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  result = FALSE
)
```

```{r, fig.width = 13, fig.height = 6}
smcpp <- get_smcpp()

#log_years <- smcpp %>% filter(GenusSpecies == "Rallus limicola") %>% filter(T ==1) %>% pull(years) %>% log()
#inc <- log_years[2] - log_years[3]
#vira_start = exp(log_years[2] - inc)

smcpp <- 
  smcpp %>%
  group_by(pop) 

ggplot(smcpp) +
  geom_line(lwd = 1, aes(x = years, y = y, col = T)) +
  scale_x_continuous(trans = "log10") +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "log10") +
  facet_wrap(~pop)+
  theme_classic() +
  scale_color_manual(values = viridis::mako(3, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8)) +
  ylab("Ne") +
  xlab("years") 

ggplot(filter(smcpp, T == 3, !is.na(pop))) +
  geom_rect(aes(xmin = 0.3e3, xmax = 11.7e3, ymin = 0, ymax = Inf), fill = "grey", alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 21e3) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 130e3) +
  geom_line(lwd = 1, aes(x = years, y = y, col = factor(pop))) +
  scale_x_continuous(trans = "log10") +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "log10") +
  theme_classic() +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("purple2", "orange2", "turquoise4", "#575757")) +
  # added so that 10^2 is shown on the graph
  #geom_vline(xintercept = 100, alpha = 0) +
  ylab("Ne") +
  xlab("years") +
  ggtitle("T = 2")

  cur	Current (1979 – 2013)		CHELSA
lh	Late Holocene: Meghalayan	4.2-0.3 ka	Fordham  et al. 2017
mh	Mid Holocene: Northgrippian	8.326-4.2 ka	Fordham  et al. 2017
eh	Early Holocene: Greenlandian	11.7-8.326 ka	Fordham  et al. 2017
yds	Pleistocene: Younger Dryas Stadial	12.9-11.7 ka	Fordham  et al. 2017
ba	Pleistocene: Bølling-Allerød	14.7-12.9 ka	Fordham  et al. 2017
hs1	Pleistocene: Heinrich Stadial 1	17.0-14.7 ka	Fordham  et al. 2017
lgm	Pleistocene: Last Glacial Maximum	ca. 21 ka	CHELSA
lig	Pleistocene: Last Interglacial	ca. 130 ka	Otto-Bliesner et al. 2006
```

# Joint models
```{r, fig.width = 13, fig.height = 6}
joint <- get_joint()

# The divergence time is very recent
# 25-85 years ago
print("Bay Area vs Southern California:")
filter(joint, joint_short == "ba_sc" & label == "blra_sc") %>% filter(x != 0) %>% dplyr::select(T, years)

print("Bay Area vs Sierra Foothills:")
filter(joint, joint_short == "ba_sf" & label == "blra_sf") %>% filter(x != 0) %>% dplyr::select(T, years)

ggplot(filter(joint, T == 1)) +
  geom_line(data = filter(smcpp, T == 1, GenusSpecies == "Laterallus jamaicensis"), aes(x = years, y = y, col = group), lwd = 1, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_line(aes(x = years, y = y, col = group), lwd = 1, alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~joint) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("purple2", "orange2", "turquoise4")) +
  scale_x_continuous(trans = "log10") +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "log10") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(strip.background = element_rect(colour = NA)) +
  ylab("Ne") +
  xlab("years") +
  ggtitle("BLRA (T = 1)")
```
